name: Spicy Peas Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the peas and chop up other vegetables small.
2. Sweat onions with a little water until wilted, then add garlic and spices. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
3. Stir in rice and sauté for 5 minutes longer.
4. Add hot water (covering the pot) and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until liquid is absorbed (about an hour).
5. Meanwhile, plump raisins for 5 minutes in hot water; drain.
6. Toast almonds.
7. Stir cooked rice with plumped raisins and vegetables, heating through briefly before topping with toasted almonds.
Note: The original recipe may call for too much water. Additional garam masala is recommended if desired.
